	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = KOL

	set_cabinet_member_cost_modifier = -0.1
	country_cabinet_efficiency = 0.05


	requires = diplomatic_range_age_1
}
